title: High Impact Selling Skills (2D)
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable customer-facing workshop for improving high impact selling skills (2d) performance.
whyThisMatters: High Impact Selling Skills (2D) helps sales, marketing, and service teams improve high impact selling skills (2d) through clearer conversations, stronger follow-through, and more consistent customer handling. Participants practise high impact selling skills, High Impact Selling Skills focuses on the following areas, and Structured selling process so they can apply the skills in real customer situations.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.

modules.title: High Impact Selling Skills focuses on the following areas

methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
